mncLayerAuto.Description: Plugin is used to automatically add a layer to the created objects
mncLayerAuto.FullDescription: Plugin processes the creation, copying, pasting and other commands when working with AutoCAD objects – dimensions, text, multileaders, hatching, tables, viewports, lines, polylines, xLines, rays, circles, ellipses, splines, arcs, blocks – and sets the layer specified in the plugin settings for them. There is an option to specify the specified layers for the selected objects. There is an opportunity to set block layers by name
mncLayerAuto.h12: The function of the plugin is based on the processing of the command completion event. However, not all commands create new objects and can also cause errors when working with this plugin. You can edit the list of excluding yourself
mncLayerAuto.h15: Remove a command from the list
mncLayerAuto.h21: Save the settings for the current drawing and close the window
mncLayerAuto.h32: ModPlus: The object is moved to the layer:
mncLayerAuto.h49: Save layer settings for blocks by name to xml-file
mncLayerAuto.h50: Load layer settings for blocks by names from xml-file
mncLayerAuto.h51: The selected file is not a file for storing layer settings for blocks by name
mncLayerAuto.h59: Save layer settings for commands by name to XML file
mncLayerAuto.h60: Load layer settings for blocks by name from XML file
mncLayerAuto.h61: The selected file is not a layer settings storage file for commands by name
mncLayerAuto.h62: You must specify the global command name. You can get the global command name by entering in the command line: (getcname "COMMAND NAME")
